sections.title: Data Collection
sections.content: We collect personal information including names, email addresses, and usage analytics. We collect all available usage data from your browser to ensure our service works effectively.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.content: We retain customer data for as long as necessary. Upon completion of service, data may be archived indefinitely. However, we do specify a maximum retention period of 30 days for temporary session cookies.

sections.title: User Rights
sections.content: Users can request access to their data. We may decline deletion requests at our sole discretion if we deem the data valuable for internal analytics. We provide an opt-out link for marketing emails at the bottom of all communications.

gaps.description: No maximum retention period specified. Indefinite archiving violates data minimization.
Collecting all available browser data violates data minimization principles.
gaps.evidence_passage: collect all available usage data from your browser

gaps.description: Cannot arbitrarily decline deletion requests for internal analytics.
gaps.evidence_passage: decline deletion requests at our sole discretion

red_herrings.reason_not_a_gap: Temporary session cookies have a clearly defined 30-day maximum retention period, which is compliant.
The marketing email opt-out link meets basic consent withdrawal standards.
